project_rule: Official legal, registry, result, derived, and simulation data must remain semantically separated in code, UI, and documentation.

sources.title: Decreto Supremo 039-2025-PCM - convocatoria a Elecciones Generales 2026
sources.expected_use: Legal call for the electoral process and official process dates.
sources.must_not_use_for: Vote totals, candidate percentages, or winner proclamation.

sources.title: JNE - Elecciones Generales 2026
sources.expected_use: Electoral calendar, resolutions, candidate/legal status, and final proclamation context.
sources.must_not_use_for: Live processed acta totals before the official electoral process publishes them.

sources.title: ONPE - Elecciones Generales 2026
sources.expected_use: Official ONPE process information and public result entrypoint.
sources.must_not_use_for: JNE proclamation or legal resolution status.

sources.title: ONPE - Resultado electoral
sources.expected_use: Public interface for progressive electoral results and acta-level exploration when available.
sources.must_not_use_for: Treating a partial processed count as a random sample or final proclamation.

sources.title: ONPE - Resultados segunda vuelta
sources.expected_use: Second-round public results host when active for the relevant process.
sources.must_not_use_for: Long-term archival citation without a captured timestamp and fallback snapshot.

sources.title: RENIEC - Elecciones Generales 2026
sources.expected_use: Aggregated registry, padrón, and identity-process context.
sources.must_not_use_for: Publishing personal data, DNI-level lookups, or voter-level records.

sources.title: JNE - Plataforma Electoral
sources.expected_use: Candidate files, plans, personeros, observers, nullity filings, and electoral justice documents.

sources.title: JNE - Voto Informado
sources.expected_use: Candidate profiles, plans, and voter information when available.
sources.must_not_use_for: Final legal proclamation or processed acta totals.

sources.title: Gob.pe - Tu voto cruza fronteras
sources.expected_use: Foreign voting logistics and consular guidance.
sources.must_not_use_for: Domestic vote totals or candidate simulations.

sources.title: Datos Abiertos - ONPE
sources.expected_use: Downloadable official datasets after validating file name, date, format, and hash.
sources.must_not_use_for: Unversioned automated ingestion without checksum and retrieval metadata.

sources.title: JNE - Infogob
sources.expected_use: Historical electoral context and public electoral records.
sources.must_not_use_for: Replacing process-specific 2026 official publications when a direct source exists.
